name: Shrimp-And-Leek Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped leeks (white and green parts)
1/4 pound Fresh medium-sized shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 1/2 tablespoons Assorted minced fresh herbs (parsley, chives, thyme)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Using 1 tablespoon of olive oil, sauté the leeks over high heat for 1 minute. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Blend the goat cheese, garlic, and 1 tablespoon of herbs together with a fork.
4. Brush rolled-out pizza dough with 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
5. Spread the leeks over the dough. Sprinkle with the goat cheese and top with tomato slices.
6. Bake the pizza for 8 minutes.
7. Add the shrimp to the pizza and continue baking for the remaining 7-8 minutes.
8. Serve with additional olive oil drizzled on top.
Makes 2 9-inch pizzas
